title: Kamino security droid
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:KaminoDroid.png|thumb|right|200px|A Kamino security droid]]
'''Kamino security droids''' were [[Tipoca City/Legends|Tipoca City's]] form of defense against invaders and threats, often being used in conjunction with [[Unidentified guard droid|guard droids]] that held a similar blue-and-white color motif. They levitated and fired blasters. [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]] programmed the [[Droid/Legends|droids]] to attack [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] during [[Gender/Legends|his]] escape from [[Kamino/Legends|Kamino]].<ref name="Attack">[[Star Wars: Episode II Attack of the Clones (video game)|''Star Wars'': Episode II ''Attack of the Clones'' video game]]</ref>

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: Episode II Attack of the Clones (video game)|''Star Wars'': Episode II ''Attack of the Clones'' video game]] {{1st}}
